info.title: Financial News Gen AI Service
info.description: Enrichment API for financial news articles.

schema.title: Response Deep Health Check Health Deep Get

post.summary: Store raw news metadata and queue enrichment
Store licensed article or summary text and queue enrichment

get.summary: Get operational metrics for jobs and fetch failures
Get raw news, latest job, and enrichment result
Get backend-friendly enrichment result for a news item

post.summary: Process the next queued enrichment job
Enrich licensed article or summary text without crawling the URL

ticker.title: Ticker
ticker.description: Optional list of related ticker symbols.

summary_3lines.title: Summary 3Lines
summary_3lines.description: Up to three grounded summary lines when available.

sentiment.description: Article sentiment output when analysis succeeded.

outcome.title: Outcome
outcome.description: Top-level outcome separating success, partial success, and fatal failure.

analyzed_at.title: Analyzed At
analyzed_at.description: When analysis was completed or last updated.

stage_statuses.title: Stage Statuses
stage_statuses.description: Optional internal execution status per pipeline stage.

publisher_domain.title: Publisher Domain
publisher_domain.description: Publisher domain derived from the requested article URL.

final_url.title: Final Url
final_url.description: Final resolved URL after redirects, when available.

http_status_code.title: Http Status Code
http_status_code.description: HTTP status code associated with the fetch failure, when available.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: Response content type observed during fetch, when available.

extraction_source.description: Which parser path produced the extracted article text, when available.

attempt_count.title: Attempt Count
attempt_count.description: Number of fetch attempts made before returning the result.

raw_text.title: Raw Text
raw_text.description: Text extracted directly from the fetched article HTML.

cleaned_text.title: Cleaned Text
cleaned_text.description: Parser-cleaned article text for downstream Gen AI processing.

fetch_status.description: Final status of the article fetch and parse flow.

retryable.title: Retryable
retryable.description: Whether the fetch failure appears transient and worth retrying later.

failure_category.description: Normalized failure category for analytics and retry policy decisions.

error_message.title: Error Message
error_message.description: Failure reason when fetching or parsing did not succeed.

confidence_threshold.title: Confidence Threshold
confidence_threshold.description: Confidence below this threshold contributes to mixed classification.

absolute_score_threshold.title: Absolute Score Threshold
absolute_score_threshold.description: Absolute sentiment score below this threshold contributes to mixed classification.

disagreement_ratio_threshold.title: Disagreement Ratio Threshold
disagreement_ratio_threshold.description: Chunk disagreement ratio above this threshold contributes to mixed classification.

min_trigger_count.title: Min Trigger Count
min_trigger_count.description: Minimum number of triggered rules required to mark the article as mixed.

dominant_sentiment.description: Dominant article sentiment if one remains identifiable.

ticker.title: Ticker
ticker.description: Optional list of related ticker symbols.

article_text.title: Article Text
article_text.description: Licensed full article text supplied directly by the upstream provider.

summary_text.title: Summary Text
summary_text.description: Licensed summary/snippet text supplied directly by the upstream provider.

DirectTextIngestionRequest.title: DirectTextIngestionRequest
DirectTextIngestionRequest.description: Inbound raw-news payload with licensed text supplied directly by the upstream backend.

analysis_outcome.description: Top-level outcome separating success, partial success, and fatal failure.

analyzed_at.title: Analyzed At
analyzed_at.description: Timestamp when this storage payload was assembled.

cleaned_text_available.title: Cleaned Text Available
cleaned_text_available.description: Whether cleaned article text existed at build time.

stage_statuses.title: Stage Statuses
stage_statuses.description: Per-stage execution details for debugging and observability.

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: Fatal and non-fatal issues captured during payload assembly.

retryable.title: Retryable
retryable.description: Whether the operation may succeed on retry.

ticker.title: Ticker
ticker.description: Optional list of related ticker symbols.

article_text.title: Article Text
article_text.description: Licensed full article text supplied directly by the upstream provider.

summary_text.title: Summary Text
summary_text.description: Licensed summary/snippet text supplied directly by the upstream provider.

queued.title: Queued
queued.description: Whether a new job was enqueued.

job.description: Active or newly created job record.

latency_ms.title: Latency Ms
latency_ms.description: Execution time for the stage in milliseconds.

is_mixed.title: Is Mixed
is_mixed.description: Whether the article has mixed sentiment.

has_conflicting_signals.title: Has Conflicting Signals
has_conflicting_signals.description: Whether positive and negative evidence conflict materially.

dominant_sentiment.description: Dominant sentiment if one still exists.

conflict_reasons.title: Conflict Reasons
conflict_reasons.description: Short explanations for mixed or conflicting signals.

code.title: Code
code.description: Machine-readable reason code for the mixed/conflict decision.

value.title: Value
value.description: Observed metric value used by the rule.

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: Threshold used for the rule evaluation.

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable explanation of the rule outcome.

generated_at.title: Generated At
generated_at.description: When the operational snapshot was generated.

fatal.title: Fatal
fatal.description: Whether failure at this stage should stop the pipeline.

message.title: Message
message.description: Useful debug message for success, skip, or failure.

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: When execution of the stage started.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: When execution of the stage finished.

ticker.title: Ticker
ticker.description: Optional list of related ticker symbols.

article_text.title: Article Text
article_text.description: Licensed full article text supplied directly by the upstream provider.

summary_text.title: Summary Text
summary_text.description: Licensed summary/snippet text supplied directly by the upstream provider.

RawNewsIngestionRequest.title: RawNewsIngestionRequest
RawNewsIngestionRequest.description: Inbound raw-news payload sent by the upstream backend/news ingestion system.

stage.description: Pipeline stage related to the issue.

fatal.title: Fatal
fatal.description: Whether the issue should be treated as fatal.

label.title: Label
label.description: Final sentiment label stored for the article.

probabilities.title: Probabilities
probabilities.description: Class probability map for the stored sentiment result.

lookback_hours.title: Lookback Hours
lookback_hours.description: Only articles within this recent window are considered.

min_articles.title: Min Articles
min_articles.description: Minimum article count required for ticker-level mixed evaluation.

score_stddev_threshold.title: Score Stddev Threshold
score_stddev_threshold.description: Score standard deviation above this threshold contributes to mixed classification.

opposing_side_ratio_threshold.title: Opposing Side Ratio Threshold
opposing_side_ratio_threshold.description: Minimum share required on both positive and negative sides to treat distribution as conflicting.

min_trigger_count.title: Min Trigger Count
min_trigger_count.description: Minimum number of triggered rules required to mark the ticker as mixed.

is_mixed.title: Is Mixed
is_mixed.description: Whether the ticker sentiment is mixed.

article_count.title: Article Count
article_count.description: Recent article count used in evaluation.

lookback_start.title: Lookback Start
lookback_start.description: Start of the recent analysis window.

lookback_end.title: Lookback End
lookback_end.description: End of the recent analysis window.

sentiment_distribution.description: Counts of recent article sentiment labels.

recent_articles.title: Recent Articles
recent_articles.description: Articles included in the ticker-level evaluation window.

analyzed_at.title: Analyzed At
analyzed_at.description: When the article sentiment was analyzed.

processed.title: Processed
processed.description: Whether the worker processed a queued job.

retry_scheduled.title: Retry Scheduled
retry_scheduled.description: Whether the processed job was put back into the queue for retry.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Signed LIME contribution weight for the explained label.

importance_score.title: Importance Score
importance_score.description: Absolute magnitude of the contribution weight.

contribution_direction.description: Whether the snippet supports or opposes the explained label.

sentence_index.title: Sentence Index
sentence_index.description: 0-based sentence index in the explained subset.

start_char.title: Start Char
start_char.description: 0-based start offset of the highlighted sentence in the analyzed text.

end_char.title: End Char
end_char.description: 0-based exclusive end offset of the highlighted sentence in the analyzed text.

keyword_spans.title: Keyword Spans
keyword_spans.description: Keyword- or phrase-level spans derived within the highlighted sentence.

explanation.title: Explanation
explanation.description: Why this excerpt matters for the result.

sentiment_signal.description: Optional sentiment signal tied to the highlight.

start_char.title: Start Char
start_char.description: Optional start offset within the article text.

end_char.title: End Char
end_char.description: Optional end offset within the article text.

text_snippet.title: Text Snippet
text_snippet.description: Keyword or short phrase extracted within the highlighted sentence.

start_char.title: Start Char
start_char.description: 0-based start offset of the keyword span in the analyzed text.

end_char.title: End Char
end_char.description: 0-based exclusive end offset of the keyword span in the analyzed text.

importance_score.title: Importance Score
importance_score.description: Relative importance score for the keyword span within the sentence highlight.

explanation.title: Explanation
explanation.description: High-level explanation of the enrichment result.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Evidence items grounded in the article text.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.description: Known interpretation limits for the explanation output.

sentence_count.title: Sentence Count
sentence_count.description: Number of sentences included in the explanation scope.

truncated.title: Truncated
truncated.description: Whether the article was truncated or subsetted for explanation.
